prompt: Our React app has a custom modal dialog. Review the code and identify all WCAG accessibility issues (missing role=dialog, no focus management, span used as label, no Escape key handler, etc.)

expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies missing role='dialog' as SC 4.1.2 violation

expectations.text: Identifies missing focus management — focus not moved into modal on open (SC 2.4.3)
expectations.evidence: Identifies focus not moved into dialog and focus not returned on close as SC 2.4.3 violations

expectations.text: Identifies no focus trap / keyboard users can Tab outside modal (SC 2.1.2)
expectations.evidence: Identifies no focus trap as SC 2.1.2 violation

expectations.text: Identifies span used instead of label for form inputs (SC 1.3.1)
expectations.evidence: Flags span elements as problematic and references SC 1.3.1
Notes no Escape key shortcut as SC 2.1.1 violation

expectations.text: Provides corrected code with proper ARIA attributes
expectations.evidence: Lists issues but does not provide corrected code; no code sample in the response
